Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection across all cases
Percentage of variants that include SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is immediately followed by SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences that are part of variants ending with SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection compared to SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' occurs

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurs before SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Number of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection events that are not followed by any reviewer assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' does not occur

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that appears in variants leading to a revision outcome (SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection relative to the total number of reviewer-related activities (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants containing SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that also include at least one reminder activity (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Number of cases where SW-Initial Reviewer Selection is followed by delays (e.g., SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days, SW-Reviewer Selection is now due, or SW-Reviewer Selection is 1 week late)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurrences that eventually lead to SW-Reviewer Agreed within the same case
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection in comparison to RW-Initial Reviewer Selection (indicating its role in initial vs. revised submission phases)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' activities for cases where activity 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Initial Reviewer Selection that occurs after Plagiarism Originality Report Completed but before any AE assignment activity
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'
